title: Craccina puberula
intro:
There is no information available on the plant Craccina puberula. However, it seems like the correct name of the plant is Crataeva nurvala. 

Here is a paragraph about Crataeva nurvala:

Crataeva nurvala, commonly known as Craccina puberula, is a plant species found in the Himalayan region. The health benefits of Crataeva nurvala include its ability to treat various health conditions such as kidney stones, kidney problems, and urinary tract infections due to its diuretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Crataeva nurvala include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The most common herbal preparations made with Crataeva nurvala include its dried leaves, roots, and fruits, which are used to make decoctions and infusions for medicinal purposes.
